calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-03-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-25-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Earl Johnson, Esq. for Plaintiff: Taufik N. Mohsen, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Susan M. Oubre and Sidney F. Taylor, Jr.
Matter is taken under submission.
Proposed blank Judgment rec'd in court.

April 25, 2006
Judgment granted as follows:
Damages $23,512.24
Punitive Damages $75,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $3,471.72
Costs $330.50, for a total of $102,314.46
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2006 Off Calendar
